records.summary: A listing page showing two upcoming yoga retreats near Berlin — 'Be the Leaf' (March 2026) and 'Where We Bloom' (April/May) — with minimal details and links to separate booking forms and detail pages.
records.retreatName: Multiple retreats: Be the Leaf / Where We Bloom
records.where: Haven Havelland (90 min from Berlin) / Buckow, Märkische Schweiz
records.price: Not shown on page; 'Where We Bloom' links to external site for pricing
records.notes: Two retreats are mixed on one listing page with almost no detail — no price for first retreat, no inclusions, no schedule, and pricing for the second retreat requires visiting an external site.
